# Cloud Waste Scanner Community v2.9.23

v2.9.23 is a content/release-governance update for the private release line.  
This tag is used to keep release history continuous while binary metadata remains unchanged.

## What changed

- Added a dedicated release note entry for `v2.9.23`.
- Standardized release sequencing for non-binary updates in GitHub release flow.
- Confirmed this release does **not** modify packaged app binary version fields.

## Compatibility

- App metadata version: unchanged from previous binary build.
- Scope: release documentation/governance only.

## Notes

- This release identifier is intended for private release tracking and audit continuity.
